coalitions: US-led joint Arctic environmental incident-response coalition
Nordic states (Finland, Norway, Denmark) aligned on cooperative governance norms
note: The cooperative mood and shared urgency of the tanker spill let the US, with momentum, broker a framework for joint environmental/incident-response cooperation while all delegations quietly shelved their harder sovereignty red lines (NWP, NSR, Svalbard EEZ, shelf claims) rather than risk the low-pressure talks collapsing.
